name: Italian Cracked Wheat and Pepper Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients in the order suggested by your bread machine manual and process on the basic bread cycle according to the manufacturer's directions.
2. Let the loaf cool before slicing.
3. Minestrone and vegetable soup taste even better with this spicy, crunchy bread. Toast slices and use as a base for eggs Benedict or rub with olive oil, cut into fingers, toast, and you will have a rustic, portable hors d'oeuvre.
